title: InsaneRTP
description: InsaneRTP is a powerful and customizable random teleport (RTP) plugin for Minecraft servers. It ensures safe teleportation, supports multi-world compatibility, customizable settings,messages. Optimized for Paper, it's perfect for enhancing your gameplay.
body:
**InsaneRTP - The Ultimate Random Teleport Plugin!**

InsaneRTP is a powerful and customizable random teleportation plugin designed to enhance your Minecraft server! Whether you're running a survival, lifesteal, or earth server, InsaneRTP allows players to explore new locations with ease.

🔹 Highly Configurable – Customize teleport ranges, cooldowns, and world-specific settings.

🔹 Smart Location Detection – Ensures safe teleports by avoiding water, lava, and high falls.

🔹 Permissions Support – Easily manage RTP access for different player groups.

🔹 Lightweight & Efficient – Optimized for performance with minimal impact on your server.

Get InsaneRTP today and let your players discover new adventures with a single command! 🚀

✅ Supports 1.21-1.21.4
📜 Permissions & Commands Included
